scheme.scheme_name: HDFC Multi Cap Fund Direct Growth

facts.exit_load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year.
facts.taxation: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.title: Overview
sections.text: HDFC Multi Cap Fund is a Multi Cap Equity mutual fund offered by HDFC Mutual Fund. Its riskometer classification is Very High. Its benchmark index is Nifty 500 Multicap 50:25:25 Total Return Index. The fund manager is Gopal Agrawal. It was launched on 10-Dec-2021. Its ISIN is INF179KC1BS5.

sections.title: Fees and Charges
sections.text: The expense ratio of HDFC Multi Cap Fund is 0.96%. The exit load is: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year. Stamp duty is 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020).

sections.title: Investment Limits
sections.text: The minimum SIP investment is ₹100. The minimum lumpsum (one-time) investment is ₹100. The minimum additional investment is ₹100. The minimum withdrawal amount is ₹100. Lock-in: No lock-in period. SIP investment is allowed.

sections.title: Taxation
sections.text: Taxation for HDFC Multi Cap Fund (category: Equity): If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.title: Fund Size and NAV
sections.text: The assets under management (AUM) is approximately ₹19,580.68 crore. The latest NAV is ₹19.608 as of 30-Jun-2026.

sections.title: Fund House and Registrar
sections.text: The registrar and transfer agent (RTA) for HDFC Multi Cap Fund is Cams. The AMC (HDFC Mutual Fund) registered address is "HDFC House", 2nd Floor, H. T. Parekh Marg, 165-166, BackbayReclamation, Churchgate Mumbai 400020.

sections.title: Scheme Description
sections.text: The scheme seeks to generate long term capital appreciation by investing in equity and equity related securities of large cap, mid cap and small cap companies.
